title: ドキッ！バキッ！噂のおばけ退治！？

text_block_list.text:
GYAAAAAH!
GH-GH-GH-GHOOOOOST!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So this is it?! This is where you saw that bloodred
ghost last night?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, well... This is where I thought I saw it at least. Although King did say she saw it too.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
King hasn't been able to focus on training ever
since she saw it... The poor dear!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: There's nothing left but to exorcise this spirit!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll track it to the ends of the Earth if I have to!
And then I'll give it a good old-fashioned
one-two punch!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The ends of the... Hey, wait up! I'm coming with
you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's gonna be a disaster if you crash through the
dorms breaking everything!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
They say you can hear a moaning voice coming
from the bathroom sinks sometimes! There were
rumors of a ghost back home as well. I wonder if
they're friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whuh... Whooo... Whooo...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Th-there it is! That's the sound Fine was talking
abou—

text_block_list.name: Half-Asleep Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Ugh, I dozed off again. Waiting for the laundry always makes me sleepy... Well, time to go back to my room.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
The kitchen is a dangerous place at night...
Apparently, this girl appears laughing quietly to
herself as she gobbles her victims up!
Hehehe... Oohoohoo... Sorry... I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Is that her?!

text_block_list.name: Drooling Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I know I shouldn't be here this late! I'm sorry, but
midnight snacks are so delicious! Pork ramen
too... I'm sorry... but they're the best!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wheeze, wheeze... W-we haven't come across a single ghost!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Uh, you two are sweating like crazy! Have you
been running around looking for it this whole
time?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... But I'm thinking this oughta be enough.
We've looked all over and haven't found anyth—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wrrrooong! It doesn't matter whether it actually
exists or not at this point!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It... doesn't?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If there's no ghost, we need to find proof there's
no ghost! If there is a ghost, we need to find
proof and hunt it down!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Either way, I'm going to settle this matter once
and for all so that King can rest easy! And not
only that...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I won't allow anyone here to feel afraid! I will take
care of this or my name isn't Kawakami Princess!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text: Wow! You'd do all that for us, Kawakami?!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Residents
text_block_list.text:
You know what, we have to help too! This
problem affects all of us, so we should all pitch in
to solve it!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I guess my hands are tied! I started this whole
thing, after all. I'll see it through to the end.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well said! All right, then! We'll do it toge—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwish!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah! What happened to the lights?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
W-w-wait! Over there by the wall... Something's
glowing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ended up working late today, so I'm hurrying
back to my room when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: SMASH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Stop right there, you dastardly ghost!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I beg your pardon! But I'm in pursuit of a
ghost at the moment! If you'll excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I haven't the faintest idea what's going on.
Judging by the huge hole in the dorm wall,
however, I've got a feeling she's going to have a
lot to answer for.
